title: verilog: modules can't override global type definitions

features.name: typedef shadowing with global and module-local same-name typedefs
features.description: Code should include a global typedef defined outside any module and a module-local typedef with the same name that should shadow the global one

features.name: variable assignment with shadowed typedef
features.description: Code should include a variable declared with a typedef name that is shadowed by a module-local typedef, where the assignment width should match the local typedef
